title: The Baltimore–Washington Corridor Is Recovering, Just Not Everywhere at Once
summary: Evan Langert is quoted throughout this look at why headline vacancy statistics mask sharply different recoveries across the corridor's submarkets — and what that means for businesses choosing a location. "Most people are not going to make a left turn across traffic to go to your place."

title: Prominent Bethesda Church at 5144 Massachusetts Ave Hits the Market
summary: The Washington Business Journal covers The Langert Commercial Group's exclusive listing of the 28,700 SF Bethesda Church property on 2.15 acres — a rare institutional asset with interim income from a Montessori school tenant and cellular equipment in the steeple.
